description_long: This helmet features a robust, medieval-inspired design with a dark metallic finish and a prominent central ridge running from front to back. The front faceplate is perforated with two rows of small circular ventilation holes, providing breathability while maintaining protection. The helmet's surface is segmented with reinforced bands and panels, giving it a rugged, armored appearance. The top and sides are adorned with a wide, lighter-colored stripe, adding visual contrast to the otherwise dark, weathered metal. The rear of the helmet is solid and rounded, with no visible openings or attachments. Overall, the helmet exudes a utilitarian, protective aesthetic suitable for urban or combat scenarios.
description: A dark, armored helmet with a central ridge, perforated faceplate, and contrasting light stripe, evoking a medieval, protective style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the perforated faceplate, central ridge, and the lighter stripe running vertically.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlights the solid back, rounded shape, and the continuation of the central stripe and reinforced bands.
description_view_2: Back view displays the unbroken, solid rear panel and the full width of the central stripe.
description_view_3: Rear-right view mirrors the left, showing the rounded back, side paneling, and the stripe's path.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Two rows of small circular holes on the lower front faceplate, evenly spaced and symmetrically arranged.
attribute_graphic_design: A single wide, light gray stripe runs from front to back over a dark, weathered metallic surface; no additional graphics or motifs.
